name: La Maida House Bran Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, bran, raisins, pecans, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. Stir thoroughly.
3. In a small bowl, mix egg, milk, oil, honey, molasses, and vinegar.
4. Make a well in the center of the dry ingredients. Add the egg mixture and stir only until just combined; do not overmix.
5. Fill muffin cups 2/3 full with batter.
6. Bake for 15 minutes. Serve warm.
Variations:
- Add grated carrot, crushed pineapple, chopped prunes, chopped apples, cinnamon, or any other fruits and spices.
